narrative:
Wayne Township (precinct in Adams County) has 859 registered voters, with 41.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 49.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.6 percentage points.
